content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 30, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
June 30 saw significant progress in voice infrastructure, agent orchestration, and build system optimization. Key achievements include the integration of real-time wake-word detection, a major overhaul of the onboarding experience, and the consolidation of plugin build processes. Development efforts also focused on hardening cloud deployment pipelines and expanding test coverage for voice and browser-based agent tasks.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Voice & Desktop Enhancements**
*   Enabled `eliza:fused-wake` event emission from the native `OpenWakeWordDetector` ([#10373](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10373)).
*   Streamlined the desktop experience by defaulting to the chromeless bottom bar ([#10370](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10370)).
*   Integrated onboarding directly into the `ContinuousChatOverlay`, removing legacy UI stacks ([#10302](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10302)).
*   Advanced voice e2e testing with new Apple Stage-B STT benchmarks and real-device voice evidence ([#10372](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10372), [#10371](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10371)).

**Agent Orchestration & Security**
*   Wired independent read-only verifiers into the `autoVerifyCompletion` gate ([#10328](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10328)).
*   Implemented watchdog round-trip detection and spend-cap warnings for sub-agents ([#10323](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10323)).
*   Hardened security role gates and prompt-injection protections ([#10348](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10348)).
*   Prevented fabricated failure replies in the planner policy ([#10345](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10345)).

**Build System & Infrastructure**
*   Consolidated plugin build processes onto a shared `buildPlugin` driver, improving build efficiency and type-safety ([#10347](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10347), [#10344](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10344)).
*   Optimized CI/CD pipelines for cloud deployments, moving critical jobs to hosted runners to improve reliability ([#10366](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10366), [#10362](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10362)).
*   Added new third-party plugins to the registry, including `elizaos-plugin-quantumscan` and `eliza-plugin-klymax402` ([#10359](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10359), [#10325](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10325)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#10377](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10377): feat(plugin-browser): real-Chromium benchmark engine lane + CI gate.
*   [#10376](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10376): test(plugin-browser): real-Chromium engine lane for the MiniWoB++ benchmark.
*   [#10375](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10375): feat(agent): memory watchdog + crash-recovery/soak harness + iOS watchdog parity.
*   [#10374](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10374): test(ui): record the #9142 chat-sheet transition as an animated GIF.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*None reported.*

## NEW ISSUES
*None reported.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*None reported.*
